cards.didactic_rationale: Very high frequency particle, essential for logical argumentation.

cards.didactic_rationale: Extremely high frequency, fundamental for sensory description, irregular forms.

source_basis.evidence: (in Sāṃkhya ) the Spirit as passive and a spectator of the Prakṛti or creative force, IW. 82 &c.

cards.didactic_rationale: Key term in Samkhya and other philosophical systems, frequent and essential.

cards.didactic_rationale: High frequency, fundamental concept in physics and philosophy, interesting semantic range.

item.learner_note: Useful for learners because `kala` opens a compact, source-backed entry for कल.

source_basis.evidence: (in poetry) time equal to four Mātra s or instants, W.

cards.didactic_rationale: Core concept in phonetics, grammar, and philosophy of language, high frequency.
